span.p: I-01 Client asks Brain to store text

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
I-04 stdio MCP process
FastMCP tools

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
I-05 HTTP auth valid?
bearer, OAuth token,
or web session

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;

span.p:
I-06 stdio launch auth valid?
BRAIN_STDIO_BEARER_TOKEN
and BRAIN_STDIO_USER_ID

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
I-07 Scope Settings
to authenticated user_id

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
I-08 Validate payload
RememberRequest or
IngestSourceRequest

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;

span.p:
I-10 After normalization:
background execution?
uses RememberRequest.input length

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;

span.p:
I-10Q Queue background ingest
return queued receipt

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
I-11 Normalize first
document text into
RememberRequest

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
I-13 Taste enabled and
taste_skip is false?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
I-14 Taste / palate classifier
explicit palate mode only
uses a stricter classifier

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
I-17A Build palate payload
projection, metadata,
attributes, signals

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
I-17F Build taste result
canonical_store,
canonical_dataset,
brain_projection

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
I-19 Create taste proposal
in taste_proposals

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
I-21 Confirmation required
in request context?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;

span.p:
I-24 Create or update session map
brain_session_maps
user, profile, surface

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center;

span.p:
I-25 Build node sets
brain, user, profile

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;

span.p:
I-26 cognee_adapter.remember_text
Cognee remember()
or add()+cognify()

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;

span.p:
I-28 Write failed external receipt
brain_external_receipts
status=failed

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;

span.p:
I-29 Write synced external receipt
brain_external_receipts
status=synced

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;

span.p:
I-31 Document taste candidate scan
split text and classify chunks

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;

span.p:
I-33 Create candidate proposals
or selection-required payload

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 740px; text-align: center; width: 740px;

span.p:
I-34 Attach taste candidate policy
to ingestion receipt

Runtime error returned
with failed receipt id
